subject: [RFC PATCH 38/40] mm: compaction: skip empty tainted superpageblocks as migration source

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch optimizes the Linux kernel's page migration process by skipping empty tainted superpageblocks as a potential source of migratable pages. The patch introduces a fast-path check in the isolate_migratepages_block function to quickly return if a tainted superpageblock has no movable content, thus avoiding unnecessary per-page scanning work. This optimization preserves correctness for tainted superpageblocks with movable content and reduces overhead for those without.
